---
title: "Ritstatistiek en demografie"
format: 
  html:
    page-layout: full
server: shiny
---


```{r setup, include = FALSE}
setwd(rprojroot::find_rstudio_root_file())
source("Library/rmd/init_dashboard.R")



```


```{r context = "server"}
 observeEvent(input$menu, {
   # sink()
   # # stop("test")
   # print("test")
   warning("test")
})

 observeEvent(input$test, {
   # browser()
   # sink()
   # # stop("test")
   # print("test2")
   warning("test2")
   warning(input$menu)
 })
```


```{r}
div('test')
        tabsetPanel(
          tabPanel(title = span("Start"), actionButton("test", "Test")),
          tabPanel(title = span("Start2"), div("start2")),

          # title = "Devise",
          id = "menu")
```
